data.title: Borr Drilling Limited - Filing of 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: Borr Drilling Limited, a company listed on NYSE and Euronext Growth Oslo under the ticker BORR, has recently submitted its annual report for the year ending December 31, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This filing was made from Hamilton, Bermuda, as of March 26, 2026. Investors and stakeholders can access detailed financial information and performance metrics in the submitted Form 20-F.

data.title: RH Announces the Appointment of David Stanchak as Chief Real Estate and Transformation Officer
data.description: In Corte Madera, California, RH revealed that David Stanchak is back as Chief Real Estate and Transformation Officer. Stanchak previously led the Global Real Estate Expansion and North American Gallery Transformation from May 2015 to May 2021. He will now focus on monetizing the Company’s real estate assets in the United States and Europe. RH Chairm... (remaining characters: 217)

data.title: Datacentrex Announces Pricing of $20.17 Million Confidentially Marketed Public Offering at $2.00 per Share
data.description: In Salt Lake City on March 26, 2026, Datacentrex, Inc. (Nasdaq: DTCX), a company specializing in digital infrastructure, has disclosed its pricing for a public offering of common stock and pre-funded warrants. The offering includes shares priced at $2.00 each, which also covers the pre-funded warrant exercise cost. Datacentrex focuses on owning and managing Scrypt compute assets and exploring strategic deals within asset-backed operating businesses.

data.title: STMicroelectronics Reports on Resolutions to be Proposed at the 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders
data.description: STMicroelectronics has released information on the resolutions that will be put forward at the 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting is set to address key decisions surrounding the company's future direction, with a focus on strategic initiatives and financial planning. Shareholders will have the opportunity to vote on important matters including board member appointments, executive compensation packages, and dividend distributions. The meeting is scheduled to take place on [specific date] and anticipates the participation of a large number of stakeholders, with [insert number] shares eligible to vote. STMicroelectronics aims to position itself for continued growth and success through transparent governance and collaboration with its shareholders.
FEDERAL RESERVE GOVERNOR LISA COOK WARNED THAT INFLATION RISKS ARE NOW OUTWEIGHING EMPLOYMENT CONCERNS, AS THE IRAN WAR DRIVES HIGHER ENERGY PRICES AND ADDS PRESSURE TO ALREADY ELEVATED INFLATION.

data.title: Unison Announces Securitization of $94.2 Million Unison Home Equity Agreements
data.description: Unison, a prominent player in residential equity sharing agreements, has recently concluded its UNSN 2026-1 securitization in San Francisco. This marks their seventh transaction within Unison’s fund complex. The deal, facilitated through the Unison Midgard Fund, was backed by $94.2 million in assets and obtained an official credit rating from DBRS Morningstar. Noteworthy is the strategic division of the transaction into two investment grade tranches, aimed at optimizing capital efficiency.

data.title: Southland Announces Fourth Quarter & Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: Southland Holdings, Inc., a key player in specialized infrastructure construction services, revealed its financial performance for the quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2025. In the fourth quarter of 2025, the company reported revenue amounted to $104.0 million, a notable decrease from $267.3 million in the same quarter of 2024. Additionally, a gross loss of $193.4 million was recorded for the quarter ending in December 2025. This performance indicates a significant shift in the company's financial standing and operational outcomes.

data.title: onX and Toyota Expand Trail Revival Project to 24 Nationwide Trail Restoration Events
data.description: Volunteer trail groups are decreasing across the U.S. while outdoor recreation is on the rise, leading to community-led initiatives for trail restoration gaining momentum. In MISSOULA, Mont., on March 26, 2026, onX and Toyota have teamed up for the second consecutive year to bolster these efforts. The digital navigation technology leader, onX, and Toyota are collaborating to increase support for trail restoration as outdoor activities grow in popularity.
TRUMP: REAFFIRMS US DOES NOT REQUIRE THE STRAIT OF HORMUZ

data.title: Iran's control over Strait of Hormuz affecting shipping and energy sectors; minimal vessels permitted, pressure persists.
data.description: Iran has recently permitted a limited amount of ships to travel through its waters. However, this gesture is unlikely to significantly diminish the challenges faced by the shipping industry and energy markets in the near future.
senior Iranian officials have yet to provide a final response to the proposal for holding a high-level meeting with the United States in the coming days - axios reporter

data.title: THE PROSECCO DOC CONSORTIUM ANNOUNCES NATIONAL PROSECCO WEEK 2026, JUNE 15-21
data.description: The Prosecco DOC Consortium is excited to present the 9th edition of America's beloved sparkling wine celebration. The event is set to feature enhanced trade education, influencer collaborations, retail initiatives, and expanded festival participation throughout the United States. Scheduled for March 26, 2026, in New York, this year's festivities promise to be bigger and better, aiming to reach a wider audience. The Consortium is focused on creating more opportunities for engagement and learning, with numerous events and activations planned. Join us in commemorating this special occasion and delight in the magic of Prosecco as we continue to spread joy and appreciation for this iconic sparkling wine.

data.title: Bitcoin surged 655% when supply in profit metric dropped to 50%. Data suggests potential repeat of the trend.
data.description: In February, the profit metric for Bitcoin indicated that less than half of the total supply of Bitcoin was in profit, dropping below the 50% mark. This threshold has previously been associated with phases of accumulation of BTC. There is speculation on whether this data could suggest a similar outcome in the future.

data.title: Nasdaq's tokenization may divide trading into two markets, potentially moving beyond US exchanges, says TD Securities.
data.description: According to TD Securities, the introduction of tokenized stocks could potentially move trading away from US exchanges, leading to increased chances of price discrepancies and market fragmentation.

data.title: Twenty One Capital becomes 2nd-biggest BTC holder with 43,514 in treasury; behind Strategy's 762,099 BTC.
data.description: Jack Mallers' company, Twenty One Capital, currently has 43,514 BTC in its corporate treasury, making it the second-largest accumulation of the cryptocurrency after Strategy, which holds 762,099 BTC.

data.title: Rio Tinto boosts 2025 Australian supplier spend to record A$19.7 billion
data.description: In 2025, Rio Tinto set a new spending record in Australia by allocating A$19.7 billion to over 6,000 local suppliers. This marked a substantial A$2 billion growth from the previous year, bolstering employment and enterprises nationwide. Notably, A$1.5 billion went to suppliers in regions hosting Rio Tinto's operations, enhancing local economies. The company also hit a milestone by investing A$1.1 billion in Indigenous businesses, with A$820 million benefiting Traditional Owner enterprises.
YPF SA announces its latest financial results; profits up by 20% reaching $1 billion, surpassing expectations.

data.title: Revolution | London Introduces xBOLT™ for INSIGHT™ In-Drum Temperature Monitoring, Developed in Partnership with EXACT Technology
data.description: A new product, xBOLT™ for INSIGHT™, has been introduced by Revolution | London in Rochester, Minnesota. This offering provides real-time temperature monitoring inside concrete drums during transit without the need for external systems. This innovation aims to enhance efficiency and quality control in concrete construction projects.

data.title: QDRO Acquisition Corp. Announces Pricing of $200 Million Initial Public Offering
data.description: In New York, NY, on March 26, 2026, QDRO Acquisition Corp. unveiled the pricing details for its initial public offering. The company, a blank check entity seeking to merge with other businesses, is offering 20,000,000 units at $10.00 per unit. Each unit comprises one Class A ordinary share and half a redeemable warrant. The units will be traded on the Nasdaq Global Market starting March 27, 2026, under the ticker symbol “QADRU”. Investors can exercise one whole warrant to buy one Class A ordinary share at $11.50 per share. Following separate trading of the units, the Class A ordinary shares and warrants are projected to be listed on Nasdaq with symbols “QADR” and “QADRW”, respectively.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Repurchase of own shares on 26.03.2026
data.description: On March 26, 2026, Nordea Bank Abp announced changes in its own shares with a stock exchange release. The company, with LEI 529900ODI3047E2LIV03, repurchased its own shares with ISIN FI4000297767 on that date. The transactions were completed at 22:30 EET. The specific details of the repurchased shares, including volume and price, were not provided in the summary.
